title: TikTok Shop Launch: 2.1% CVR in 90 Days
summary: Led end-to-end TikTok Shop launch — from catalogue setup and creator partnerships to LIVE commerce events — achieving category-competitive conversion within the first quarter.
challenge: The brand had strong organic TikTok engagement (2.4M monthly views) but zero shoppable infrastructure. Competitors were capturing social commerce demand while the DTC site converted at only 1.4% on mobile traffic referred from TikTok.
strategy: Treated TikTok Shop as a dedicated channel with its own merchandising strategy rather than a Shopify mirror. Prioritised hero SKUs with video-friendly packaging, built creator affiliate programme, and aligned post-click experience between TikTok Shop and Shopify for retargeting.
implementation: Onboarded 180 SKUs to TikTok Shop with platform-native titles, pricing, and fulfilment SLAs
Recruited 12 micro-creators for affiliate campaigns with tracked commission structures
Ran 6 LIVE commerce events featuring bundle offers and limited-time discounts
Built UTM-tracked landing pages on Shopify for TikTok traffic not yet ready to buy in-app
Integrated TikTok Pixel and GA4 events for full-funnel attribution reporting
